name: qwen3.5-instruct
readme_html:
These are the standard qwen3.5 ollama models modified to be non-thinking. These models do not use the RENDERER/PARSER of the main library models, so tool handling may not be as good as the thinking versions.

$ ollama run frob/qwen3.5-instruct --experimental --experimental-yolo

This experimental version of Ollama has the bash tool enabled.
Models can read files on your computer, or run commands (after you allow them).

warning: yolo mode - all tool approvals will be skipped
>>> what is the time?

running: Bash: date
  Do 12 Mär 2026 14:21:58 CET
  

The current time is 14:21:58 CET on Sunday, March 12, 2026.

$ ollama run frob/qwen3.5-instruct describe this image ./image1.jpg 
Added image './image1.jpg'
This is a heartwarming, close-up portrait of an adorable white puppy. Here’s a 
detailed description:

**Subject:**
- The main subject is a small, fluffy white puppy, likely a young breed such 
as a Maltese, Bichon Frisé, or similar toy breed.
- It has soft, plush fur that appears clean and well-groomed.
- Its ears are small, rounded, and folded forward.
- The puppy’s eyes are dark, expressive, and slightly glossy, giving it a 
curious and innocent look.
- Its nose is small and black, and its mouth is closed in a calm expression.
- A few delicate whiskers are visible on its snout.

**Accessories:**
- Around its neck, the puppy wears a simple red collar, possibly made of 
leather or fabric with a metallic buckle.
- Attached to the collar is a small, round, gold-colored tag or bell that 
hangs down its chest.

**Posture & Setting:**
- The puppy is sitting upright on all four paws on what appears to be a light 
gray stone or concrete step or ledge.
- Its body is angled slightly toward the right side of the frame, and its head 
is turned in the same direction, as if it’s listening to or watching something 
off-camera.
- The background is softly blurred (shallow depth of field), showing 
indistinct shapes in muted tones — perhaps a wooden surface above and a darker 
area beyond — which helps keep the focus entirely on the puppy.

**Lighting & Mood:**
- The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the texture of the puppy’s 
fur without harsh shadows.
- The overall mood is peaceful, tender, and charming — evoking feelings of 
warmth, curiosity, and affection.

In summary: This image captures a serene moment featuring a sweet, fluffy 
white puppy wearing a red collar and golden tag, sitting attentively on a 
stone surface against a blurred background — perfect for conveying innocence 
and endearment.
